title: ANIMAL CONTROL - 211info
text: CITY OF BAKER CITY POLICE DEPARTMENT ANIMAL CONTROL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services such as responding to reports of animal cruelty, stray pets, and local animal code violations. 1768 Auburn Avenue Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 523-6415 0 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Dispatch (541) 523-6415 ext 0 Non-Emergency INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Baker Services: Animal Control Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - CITY OF BAKER CITY POLICE DEPARTMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
